item.title: The 444th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2024 ep 4
item.description:
HAPPY PRIDE MONTH!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays.
She'll get it someday
Me In IRL Life
Yep
I think Straight People were accidentally invented by the Bisexuals
YES HOMO
"She's from the other studio"
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He also made me one where the Chonk (me) is holding a Progress Pride flag and a Bi Pride flag. That will be featured at the end of next week's dumps. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: My baby girl crossed over the rainbow bridge today.
item.description: Her name is Cara. She was the sweetest and loved to give sloppy kisses with her floppy ears. I'll see you on the other side baby girl.
item.dc:creator: Piizzle

item.title: PSA: Corporations pay fines so they can break laws.
item.description: A 2 million dollar fine is nothing in a 50 billion dollar pool. Breaking these laws should bankrupt companies, result in arrests and jailtime for offending CEOs directing these decisions and forced nationalization of the company in response to repeat offenses.
item.dc:creator: jhill

item.title: Shut up and take my money
item.dc:creator: MrMrsCrowley

item.title: Airport Security is for show
item.description: 1) The retail worker at the gift shop has access to baggage as it's being transferred to or from planes. 2) The thief has done this multiple times 3) The Airport itself couldn't provide security camera footage, but the retail store could. 4) Americans are taking off their shoes and belts, losing nail clippers and hair gel, and having intrusive X-rays done, but any average Joe could get a retail job and stuff your luggage full of "16 oz. shampoo bottles" before the luggage is put on the plane. Sauce https://www.cnn.com/travel/airline-passenger-tracks-missing-bag-felony-theft/index.html
item.dc:creator: ReconditeEidolon

item.title: 68 lbs down in 10 months. I’m officially done losing weight! I’ve never felt better.
item.description: It’s been a lifelong struggle but I finally figured it out and I finally made it! Had the help of a coach plus therapy to address undiagnosed mental health issues that contributed to my problems with weight plus a newfound passion for Pilates ;) and I beat my sugar addiction ? I did not count calories - I just followed my coaches guidelines for portion control and what to eat and started with modest amounts of exercise (20 mins a day + my evening walks). I exercise more now because I just love it!
item.dc:creator: triedandtruerecipes

item.title: MY FIRST SOBRIETY TATTOO… TEN YEARS AND COUNTING!
item.dc:creator: BIFGoodword

item.title: Flag up, hands shaking.
item.description: It should not be this nerve wracking to put up a rainbow flag. Damn though. Nervous af the whole time. Guess we'll see which of our neighbours are kind and which are shitty. Looks good though.
item.dc:creator: chaylar
